series_metadata.series_title: State registry of habitual OVI/OMWI offenders
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes registry records created and maintained in accordance with section 5502.10 of the Revised Code, source documents received from the courts of conviction and related inquiries.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: source documents and related inquiries in office files one year, current. ; Electronic: source documents and related inquiries in Microsoft Outlook or office network one year, curent. In accordance with paragraph (C) of section 5502.10, registry records are automatically purged and refreshed every thirty days via established data management processes ensure that registry contains accurate and current information
